docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,080.00 FILED BY OUTPUT AS TO DEFENDANT ERMOIAN, JOHN DBA THE MCLEAN GROUP/SMOOTH MOVE THE MCLEAN GROUP, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OUTPUT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ERMOIAN, JOHN DBA THE MCLEAN GROUP/SMOOTH MOVE THE MCLEAN GROUP, INC. $4,080.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,095.00, PLAINTIFF'S NAME IS AMENDED TO REFLECT THE PROPER DEFT. THE MCLEAN GROUP INC. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT THE MCLEAN GROUP, INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $4,286.62 AS TO DEFENDANT THE MCLEAN GROUP, INC.
